description: Renai MedicityÂ NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 554 and 1958, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Renai MedicityÂ DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 554 and 1958 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 554, DNB in Critical Care Medicine turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Genito Urinary Surgery (Urology) with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: This institute is very good for those who are interested in stitching.

review_content.Placements: So basically, students need above 50% to get admission in fashion technology at this institute, and it costs me Rs. 8000 per semester. I don’t think there was any recruiting company for our course, but to be honest, no one got an internship; we had only one internship in the whole three years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Okay, there was one lab and three classes. Very basic things were provided in life, such as sewing machines and some basic colors and papers, and the rest of the things we have to buy on our own. Well, I wasn’t in the hostel, so I can’t tell about hostel facilities, but as much as I heard from other students, it’s quite okay.

review_content.Placements: This college is all about nursing and pharmaceutical engineering. Though there are multiple engineering branches, they still give preference to these two branches. The hostel was good looking but food was little bit not good as per my taste.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but some times faculty becomes very rude.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure, and they have a library that is well-constructed. As per studies, it is a good college, and they also have labs to do better explanations for students.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend you to join this college, and I am satisfied by studying here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provided by our college was so good as there is every facility a student needed. The quality food they provided was so hygiene, healthy, and tasteful. We also had medical facilities in case of emergency for the students. There was a computers lab in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no separate hostel, and one can stay in the hostel which is available around the college. There are many hostels for boys and girls separately at reasonable prices on a per month basis. The food menu available is decent, but it can't match home standards. Food served is good and hygienic.
The college has smart digi classes, library, labs, and Wi-Fi facility is also available at my college. There is a canteen and hostel provided. The hostel is surrounded by gardens and plants.
